context.role: Echo uncomfortable due to dirty cage (3+ poops)
context.screen_position: Center at x=64, y=60 on perch
context.usage_scenario: Triggered when poop count >= 3; persists until cage is cleaned; spawns dust particle effects

visual_specification.shape: Cockatiel with crest slightly lowered, body posture showing discomfort
visual_specification.texture: Flat pixel art with no gradients; hand-drawn organic edges
visual_specification.outline: None; pure pixel art with color blocking

animation.description: Frame 1: normal stance with lowered crest, Frame 2: slight body shift (uncomfortable), Frame 3: return to frame 1

visual_specification.details: Crest lowered to 2-3px height; eyes half-closed (2x1px); body shifts 1-2px side to side showing discomfort; no major pose changes

relationships.shared_with: Same base structure as all Echo states
relationships.differences_from: echo_idle (lowered crest, half-closed eyes), echo_sleeping (eyes visible)

explicit_negations: no visible dirt on Echo's body
